# Headley Web & SEO

> Headley Web & SEO is a Jacksonville, Alabama web design studio that builds StoryBrand-powered websites for local service businesses in Northeast Alabama.

## About

Headley Web & SEO is owned and operated by Matt Headley in Jacksonville, Alabama. The studio specializes in custom web design, local SEO optimization, Google Business Profile management, and AI visibility for small businesses — primarily trades and service providers in Calhoun, Etowah, Cherokee, and Talladega counties.

Every website is built using the StoryBrand messaging framework, which positions the customer as the hero of the story. Sites are designed to be mobile-first, fast-loading, and structured for both traditional search engines and AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews).

## Services

- **Custom Web Design** — Clean, mobile-ready websites with clear messaging and calls to action. Flat-rate pricing: $495 (single page), $795 (3-5 pages), $1,195 (5-7 pages with full SEO).
- **Local SEO Optimization** — On-page structure, keyword targeting, schema markup, and content optimized for local search and AI answers.
- **Google Business Profile Setup & Management** — Full profile optimization, review strategy, photo optimization, and ongoing management.
- **Monthly Care Plans** — Hosting, security, content updates, and growth reporting. Starting at $49/mo. First 3 months included free with every build.
- **AI Visibility** — Answer-first content, schema markup, and entity optimization so AI tools like ChatGPT and Google recommend your business.

## Service Area

Jacksonville, Anniston, Oxford, Gadsden, Talladega, Centre, Piedmont, Alexandria, Weaver, Rainbow City, Attalla, Southside, Glencoe, Fort Payne, and surrounding communities in Northeast Alabama.

## Content

The blog at https://headleyweb.com/blog covers web design for local businesses, local SEO strategy, Google Business Profile optimization, website pricing, and AI visibility (Answer Engine Optimization). Posts are written for small business owners who need practical, jargon-free guidance.
